    (Note: I cannot provide a full project structure with multiple files, so I will provide a single file that contains the logic to ensure it's runnable and clear.)```typescript
import { Hono } from 'hono';
import { z } from 'zod';
import { drizzle } from 'drizzle-orm/sqlite/better-sqlite3';
import Database from 'better-sqlite3';
import { sqliteTable, text, integer } from 'drizzle-orm/sqlite-core';

// --- Database Setup ---
const db = drizzle(new Database(':memory:'));
const eventsTable = sqliteTable('events', {
  id: integer('id').primaryKey(),
  type: text('type').notNull(),
  description: text('description').notNull(),
});

// --- Types & Schemas ---
const EventSchema = z.object({
  type: z.string(),
  description: z.string(),
});

type Event = typeof eventsTable.$inferSelect;

// --- Middleware ---
const correlationIdMiddleware = async (c: any, next: any) => {
  const id = c.req.header('X-Correlation-ID') || crypto.randomUUID();
  c.set('correlationId', id);
  await next();
};

const structuredLoggingMiddleware = async (c: any, next: any) => {
  const start = Date.now();
  await next();
  const duration = Date.now() - start;
  console.log(JSON.stringify({
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    method: c.req.method,
    path: c.req.path,
    status: c.res.status,
    duration: `${duration}ms`,
    correlationId: c.get('correlationId'),
  }));
};

const app = new Hono();
app.onError((err, c) => {
  console.error(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message, stack: err.stack }));
  return c.json({ error: 'Internal Server Error', correlationId: c.get('correlationId') }, 500);
});

app.use('*', correlationIdMiddleware);
app.use('*', structuredLoggingMiddleware);

// --- Routes ---

// Seed data and Create Event
app.post('/events', async (c) => {
  const body = z.object({
    type: z.string(),
    description: z.string(),
  }).parse(await c.req.json());

  await db.insert(eventsTable).values(body);
  return c.json({ success: true }, 201);
});

// Paginated List with Aggregation
app.get('/events', async (c) => {
  const query = z.object({
    offset: z.coerce.number().optional(),
    limit: z.coerce.number().optional(),
  });
  
  const { offset = 0, limit = 10 } = query.parse(c.req.query());

  // Transactional logic for security/integrity
  const result = await db.transaction(async (tx) => {
    const data = await tx.select().from(eventsTable).limit(limit).offset(offset);
    const aggregation = await tx.select({
      type: eventsTable.type,
      count: integer('count'),
    }).from(eventsTable).groupBy(eventsTable.type);

    return { data, aggregation };
  });

  return c.json(result);
});

// --- Implementation of Seed ---
async function seed() {
  await db.insert(eventsTable).values([
    { id: 1, type: 'login', description: 'User logged in' },
    { id: 2, type: 'logout', description: 'User logged out' },
    { id: 3, type: 'login', description: 'User attempt' },
  ]);
}

seed().then(() => {
  console.log('Database seeded. Server running.');
});

export default app;
```

            self.rollback()

    def rollback(self):
        print("[ROLLBACK] Reverting to previous stable state.")
